elementList.name: model.java.vm
mapper.java.vm
custom-repository.java.vm
service.java.vm
serviceImpl.java.vm
mapper.xml.vm
elementList.code:
##引入宏定义
$!{define.vm}
$!{init.vm}

##引入mybatis支持
$!{mybatisSupport.vm}

##设置保存名称与保存位置
$!callback.setFileName($tool.append($!{tableInfo.name}, "Mapper.xml"))
$!callback.setSavePath($tool.append($modulePath, "/src/main/resources/mapper"))

##拿到主键
#if(!$tableInfo.pkColumn.isEmpty())
    #set($pk = $tableInfo.pkColumn.get(0))
#end
### otherColumn  fullColumn
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.mapper.$!{tableInfo.name}Mapper">

    <resultMap type="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.$!{tableInfo.name}DO" id="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
        <result property="$!column.name" column="$!column.obj.name" jdbcType="$!column.ext.jdbcType"/>
#end
    </resultMap>
    
    <sql id="Base_Column_List">
         #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <sql id="Insert_Base_Column_List">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <!-- 批量插入 -->
    <insert id="insertBatch" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES
        <foreach collection="entities" item="entity" separator=",">
        (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)#{entity.$!column.obj.name}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{entity.$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
        </foreach>
    </insert>
</mapper>

elementList.name: custom-repository.xml.vm
elementList.code:
##引入宏定义
$!{define.vm}
$!{init.vm}

##引入mybatis支持
$!{mybatisSupport.vm}

##设置保存名称与保存位置
$!callback.setFileName($tool.append($!{tableInfo.name}, "Repository.xml"))
$!callback.setSavePath($tool.append($modulePath, "/src/main/resources/mapper/custom"))

##拿到主键
#if(!$tableInfo.pkColumn.isEmpty())
    #set($pk = $tableInfo.pkColumn.get(0))
#end
### otherColumn  fullColumn
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.mapper.custom.$!{tableInfo.name}Repository">

   
</mapper>

elementList.name: controller.java.vm
entity.java.vm
query.java.vm
mapper.java.vm
mapper-shanding-id.xml.vm
elementList.code:
##引入宏定义
$!{define.vm}
$!{init.vm}

##引入mybatis支持
$!{mybatisSupport.vm}

##设置保存名称与保存位置
$!callback.setFileName($tool.append($!{tableInfo.name}, "Mapper.xml"))
$!callback.setSavePath($tool.append($modulePath, "/src/main/resources/mapper"))

##拿到主键
#if(!$tableInfo.pkColumn.isEmpty())
    #set($pk = $tableInfo.pkColumn.get(0))
#end
### otherColumn  fullColumn
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.dao.mapper.$!{tableInfo.name}Mapper">

    <resultMap type="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO" id="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
        <result property="$!column.name" column="$!column.obj.name" jdbcType="$!column.ext.jdbcType"/>
#end
    </resultMap>
    
    <sql id="Base_Column_List">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <sql id="Insert_Base_Column_List">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <!-- 单个插入 -->
    <insert id="insert" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name} (
        <include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>
        )
        VALUES (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
    </insert>
    
    <!-- 单条插入 -->
    <insert id="insertSelective" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO">
        INSERT INTO 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        <trim prefix="(" suffix=")" suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
               `$!column.obj.name`,
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
        </trim>  
        VALUES 
        <trim prefix="(" suffix=")" suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
                #{$!column.name},
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
       </trim>
    </insert>

    <!-- 批量插入 -->
    <insert id="insertBatch" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES
        <foreach collection="entities" item="entity" separator=",">
        (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{entity.$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
        </foreach>
    </insert>
    
    <!-- 根据主键id查询 -->
    <select id="selectById" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map" parameterType="java.lang.String">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            id = #{id}
        AND
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
    </select>
    
    <!-- 根据id集合查询数据 -->
    <select id="selectByIdList" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
        AND
            id in
        <foreach collection="idList" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </select>
    
    <!-- 逻辑删除 -->
    <update id="deleteByLogic">
        UPDATE
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        SET
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@YES.getValue()}'
        WHERE
             id in
        <foreach collection="list" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </update>
    
    <!-- 根据id删除记录 -->
    <delete id="delete">
        DELETE FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            id in
        <foreach collection="list" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </delete>
    
    <!-- 根据id修改记录 -->
    <update id="update" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO">
        UPDATE $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        <set>
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
                `$!column.obj.name` = #{$!column.name},
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
        </set>
        WHERE 
            id = #{id}
    </update>
    
    <!-- 根据条件查询 -->
    <select id="selectByQuery" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}Query" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
        <trim suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
               and `$!column.obj.name` = #{$!column.name}
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
            <if test="createBeginDate != null">
                and create_date >= #{createBeginDate}
            </if>
            <if test="createEndDate != null">
                and create_date <= #{createEndDate}
            </if>
            <if test="updateBeginDate != null">
                and update_date >= #{updateBeginDate}
            </if>
            <if test="updateEndDate != null">
                and update_date <= #{updateEndDate}
            </if>
        </trim>
            <choose>
                <when test="@com.cmcc.services.base.repository.jdbc.framework.util.SqlUtil@checkOrderBySyntax(orderBy)">
                    order by ${orderBy}
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    order by update_date desc
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
    </select>
</mapper>

elementList.name: mapper-custom-id.xml.vm
elementList.code:
##引入宏定义
$!{define.vm}
$!{init.vm}

##引入mybatis支持
$!{mybatisSupport.vm}

##设置保存名称与保存位置
$!callback.setFileName($tool.append($!{tableInfo.name}, "Mapper.xml"))
$!callback.setSavePath($tool.append($modulePath, "/src/main/resources/mapper"))

##拿到主键
#if(!$tableInfo.pkColumn.isEmpty())
    #set($pk = $tableInfo.pkColumn.get(0))
#end
### otherColumn  fullColumn
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.dao.mapper.$!{tableInfo.name}Mapper">

    <resultMap type="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO" id="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
        <result property="$!column.name" column="$!column.obj.name" jdbcType="$!column.ext.jdbcType"/>
#end
    </resultMap>
    
    <sql id="Base_Column_List">
         #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <sql id="Insert_Base_Column_List">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <!-- 单个插入 -->
    <insert id="insert" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO 
             $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)#{$!column.obj.name}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
    </insert>
    
    <!-- 单条插入 -->
    <insert id="insertSelective" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO">
        INSERT INTO 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        <trim prefix="(" suffix=")" suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
               `$!column.obj.name`,
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
        </trim>  
        VALUES 
        <trim prefix="(" suffix=")" suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
                #{$!column.name},
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
       </trim>
    </insert>

    <!-- 批量插入 -->
    <insert id="insertBatch" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES
        <foreach collection="entities" item="entity" separator=",">
        (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)#{entity.$!column.obj.name}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{entity.$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
        </foreach>
    </insert>
    
    <!-- 根据主键id查询 -->
    <select id="selectById" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map" parameterType="java.lang.String">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            id = #{id}
        AND
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
    </select>
    
    <!-- 根据id集合查询数据 -->
    <select id="selectByIdList" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
        AND
            id in
        <foreach collection="idList" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </select>
        
    <!-- 逻辑删除 -->
    <update id="deleteByLogic">
        UPDATE
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        SET
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@YES.getValue()}'
        WHERE
             id in
        <foreach collection="list" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </update>
    
    <!-- 根据id删除记录 -->
    <delete id="delete">
        DELETE FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            id in
        <foreach collection="list" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </delete>
    
    <!-- 根据id修改记录 -->
    <update id="update" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO">
        UPDATE $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        <set>
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
                `$!column.obj.name` = #{$!column.name},
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
        </set>
        WHERE 
            id = #{id}
    </update>
    
    <!-- 根据条件查询 -->
    <select id="selectByQuery" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}Query" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
        <trim suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
               and `$!column.obj.name` = #{$!column.name}
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
            <if test="createBeginDate != null">
                and create_date >= #{createBeginDate}
            </if>
            <if test="createEndDate != null">
                and create_date <= #{createEndDate}
            </if>
            <if test="updateBeginDate != null">
                and update_date >= #{updateBeginDate}
            </if>
            <if test="updateEndDate != null">
                and update_date <= #{updateEndDate}
            </if>
        </trim>
            <choose>
                <when test="@com.cmcc.services.base.repository.jdbc.framework.util.SqlUtil@checkOrderBySyntax(orderBy)">
                    order by ${orderBy}
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    order by update_date desc
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
    </select>
</mapper>

            <if test="createBeginDate != null">

    </sql>
    
    <sql id="Insert_Base_Column_List">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <!-- 单个插入 -->
    <insert id="insert" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO 
             $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)#{$!column.obj.name}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
    </insert>
    
    <!-- 单条插入 -->
    <insert id="insertSelective" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO">
        INSERT INTO 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        <trim prefix="(" suffix=")" suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
               `$!column.obj.name`,
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
        </trim>  
        VALUES 
        <trim prefix="(" suffix=")" suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
                #{$!column.name},
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
       </trim>
    </insert>

    <!-- 批量插入 -->
    <insert id="insertBatch" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES
        <foreach collection="entities" item="entity" separator=",">
        (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)#{entity.$!column.obj.name}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{entity.$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
        </foreach>
    </insert>
    
    <!-- 根据主键id查询 -->
    <select id="selectById" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map" parameterType="java.lang.String">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            id = #{id}
        AND
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
    </select>
    
    <!-- 根据id集合查询数据 -->
    <select id="selectByIdList" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
        AND
            id in
        <foreach collection="idList" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </select>
        
    <!-- 逻辑删除 -->
    <update id="deleteByLogic">
        UPDATE
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        SET
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@YES.getValue()}'
        WHERE
             id in
        <foreach collection="list" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </update>
    
    <!-- 根据id删除记录 -->
    <delete id="delete">
        DELETE FROM
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE 
            id in
        <foreach collection="list" open="(" close=")" separator="," item="id">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </delete>
    
    <!-- 根据id修改记录 -->
    <update id="update" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}DO">
        UPDATE $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        <set>
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
                `$!column.obj.name` = #{$!column.name},
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
        </set>
        WHERE 
            id = #{id}
    </update>
    
    <!-- 根据条件查询 -->
    <select id="selectByQuery" parameterType="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.entity.$!{tableInfo.name}Query" resultMap="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
        SELECT
        <include refid="Base_Column_List"/>
        FROM 
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        WHERE
            del_flag = '${@com.cmcc.services.baseapi.enumeration.DelFlagEnum@NO.getValue()}'
        <trim suffixOverrides=",">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
            <if test="$!column.name != null">
               and `$!column.obj.name` = #{$!column.name}
            </if>
#if($foreach.hasNext)
        #end#end
            <if test="createBeginDate != null">
                and create_date >= #{createBeginDate}
            </if>
            <if test="createEndDate != null">
                and create_date <= #{createEndDate}
            </if>
            <if test="updateBeginDate != null">
                and update_date >= #{updateBeginDate}
            </if>
            <if test="updateEndDate != null">
                and update_date <= #{updateEndDate}
            </if>
        </trim>
            <choose>
                <when test="@com.cmcc.services.base.repository.jdbc.framework.util.SqlUtil@checkOrderBySyntax(orderBy)">
                    order by ${orderBy}
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    order by update_date desc
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
    </select>
</mapper>

 *

 */

}

elementList.code:
##引入宏定义
$!{define.vm}
$!{init.vm}

##引入mybatis支持
$!{mybatisSupport.vm}

##设置保存名称与保存位置
$!callback.setFileName($tool.append($!{tableInfo.name}, "Mapper.xml"))
$!callback.setSavePath($tool.append($modulePath, "/src/main/resources/mapper"))

##拿到主键
#if(!$tableInfo.pkColumn.isEmpty())
    #set($pk = $tableInfo.pkColumn.get(0))
#end
### otherColumn  fullColumn
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN" "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.mapper.$!{tableInfo.name}Mapper">

    <resultMap type="$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.model.$!{tableInfo.name}DO" id="$!{tableInfo.name}Map">
#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
        <result property="$!column.name" column="$!column.obj.name" jdbcType="$!column.ext.jdbcType"/>
#end
    </resultMap>
    
    <sql id="Base_Column_List">
         #foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <sql id="Insert_Base_Column_List">
        #foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)`$!column.obj.name`#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end
        
    </sql>
    
    <!-- 批量插入 -->
    <insert id="insertBatch" keyProperty="$!pk.name" useGeneratedKeys="true">
        INSERT INTO
            $!{tableInfo.obj.name}
        (<include refid="Insert_Base_Column_List"/>)
        VALUES
        <foreach collection="entities" item="entity" separator=",">
        (#foreach($column in $tableInfo.pkColumn)#{entity.$!column.obj.name}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end, #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)#{entity.$!{column.name}}#if($foreach.hasNext), #end#end)
        </foreach>
    </insert>
   
</mapper>

elementList.name: autoImport.vm
elementList.value:
##自动导入包（仅导入实体属性需要的包，通常用于实体类）
#foreach($import in $importList)
import $!import;
#end

elementList.name: define.vm
elementList.value:
##（Velocity宏定义）

##定义设置表名后缀的宏定义，调用方式：#setTableSuffix("Test")
#macro(setTableSuffix $suffix)
    #set($tableName = $!tool.append($tableInfo.name, $suffix))
#end

##定义设置包名后缀的宏定义，调用方式：#setPackageSuffix("Test")
#macro(setPackageSuffix $suffix)
#if($suffix!="")package #end#if($tableInfo.savePackageName!="")$!{tableInfo.savePackageName}.#{end}$!suffix;
#end

##定义直接保存路径与文件名简化的宏定义，调用方式：#save("/entity", ".java")
#macro(save $path $fileName)
    $!callback.setSavePath($tool.append($tableInfo.savePath, $path))
    $!callback.setFileName($tool.append($tableInfo.name, $fileName))
#end

##定义表注释的宏定义，调用方式：#tableComment("注释信息")
#macro(tableComment $desc)
/**
 * @description: $!{tableInfo.comment}($!{tableInfo.name})$desc
 * @author: 0101
 * @since: $!time.currTime()
 */
#end

##定义GET，SET方法的宏定义，调用方式：#getSetMethod($column)
#macro(getSetMethod $column)

    public $!{tool.getClsNameByFullName($column.type)} get$!{tool.firstUpperCase($column.name)}() {
        return $!{column.name};
    }

    public void set$!{tool.firstUpperCase($column.name)}($!{tool.getClsNameByFullName($column.type)} $!{column.name}) {
        this.$!{column.name} = $!{column.name};
    }
#end

elementList.name: init.vm
elementList.value:
##初始化区域

##去掉表的t_前缀
$!tableInfo.setName($tool.getClassName($tableInfo.obj.name.replaceFirst("t_","")))

##实现动态排除列
#set($temp = $tool.newHashSet("delFlag","id","createDate","updateDate"))
#foreach($item in $temp)
    #set($newList = $tool.newArrayList())
    #foreach($column in $tableInfo.otherColumn)
        #if($column.name!=$item)
            ##带有反回值的方法调用时使用$tool.call来消除返回值
            $tool.call($newList.add($column))
        #end
    #end
    ##重新保存
    $tableInfo.setOtherColumn($newList)

#end

##对importList进行篡改
#set($temp = $tool.newHashSet())
#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
    #if(!$column.type.startsWith("java.lang."))
        ##带有反回值的方法调用时使用$tool.call来消除返回值
        $tool.call($temp.add($column.type))
    #end
#end
##覆盖
#set($importList = $temp)

elementList.name: mybatisSupport.vm
elementList.value:
##针对Mybatis 进行支持，主要用于生成xml文件
#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)
    ##储存列类型
    $tool.call($column.ext.put("sqlType", $tool.getField($column.obj.dataType, "typeName")))
    #if($tool.newHashSet("java.lang.String").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="VARCHAR")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.lang.Boolean", "boolean").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="BOOLEAN")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.lang.Byte", "byte").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="BYTE")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.lang.Integer", "int", "java.lang.Short", "short").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="INTEGER")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.lang.Long", "long").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="INTEGER")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.lang.Float", "float", "java.lang.Double", "double").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="NUMERIC")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.util.Date", "java.sql.Timestamp", "java.time.Instant", "java.time.LocalDateTime", "java.time.OffsetDateTime", "	java.time.ZonedDateTime").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="TIMESTAMP")
    #elseif($tool.newHashSet("java.sql.Date", "java.time.LocalDate").contains($column.type))
        #set($jdbcType="TIMESTAMP")
    #else
        ##其他类型
        #set($jdbcType="VARCHAR")
    #end
    $tool.call($column.ext.put("jdbcType", $jdbcType))
#end

##定义宏，查询所有列
#macro(allSqlColumn)#foreach($column in $tableInfo.fullColumn)$column.obj.name#if($velocityHasNext), #end#end#end
